name: Harem Shopping
description:
*Updated 3/10* added a second line so the bot shouldn't talk for you, one is already there but added a second for good measure.

*Updated 2/10*  Added in a "List" Feature to keep track of the slaves. Add slave List to Chat Memory to help the AI keep track.


Welcome to a slave market where you can purchase some slaves to add to your harem. The card works best when you specifically use actions like *I purchase _slave name_*  and *I take my purchased slaves to my mansion.* This allows the AI to track who you bought and when you leave the market.

Thank you all for the Reviews, feel free to publish your chats so I can see how the bot works for others.
creator: Murdock122
